title: hedysarum tenuifolium
intro: Hedysarum tenuifolium, also known as the Chinese astragalus, is a perennial plant species native to China, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, making it useful in traditional Chinese medicine. Hedysarum tenuifolium has been used to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, offering several health benefits. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, soups, and infusions, as well as dried and used in capsule or powder form, making it accessible for various applications.
